subject: Cannot log in after password reset
body: I reset my password yesterday but the app still rejects the new one on every attempt. I've cleared my cache and tried two browsers. Please help — I'm locked out of my account.

subject: Refund not received
body: I was charged twice for the annual plan on the 3rd and only one refund has come through. The missing amount is $99.00. Can you check the second transaction?

subject: Feature request: dark mode
body: Loving the product otherwise. Any chance of a dark theme? My team works late and the bright UI is hard on the eyes.
